title: 无屏幕的复古手机正逐渐成为儿童智能手机的替代选择
content: Retro no‑screen phones are increasingly seen as a replacement for child smartphones. The trend highlights a shift toward simpler, less distracting devices. Because they lack a display, children interact with physical controls and basic features, reducing exposure to digital content. This change reflects growing concerns about screen time and its impact on young users.

title: 说句冒犯的话， DeepSeek V4 Pro 让我有点破防！
content: DeepSeek V4 Pro produced blank output for a project migrating from traditional HTML to an RN stack, while GPT‑5.4 and Claude Sonnet 4.5 performed correctly. The task involved maintaining backend output and reusing a reference project. Costs for GPT‑5.4 and Sonnet are similar (~$36USD). Early interactions with DeepSeek V4 PRO felt off and required multiple adjustments; the developer questions whether the official release will improve performance.

title: AI Inside the Enterprise
content: A podcast panel with Steven Sinofsky, Aaron Levie, and Martin Casado examines how AI is being implemented in large enterprises. They discuss the disconnect between Silicon Valley’s rapid AI progress and adoption elsewhere, the high failure rate of corporate AI projects, and how AI agents, infrastructure, and workflows are evolving beyond current hype. The episode offers insight into real‑world challenges and emerging practices for enterprise AI.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Erik Torenberg, Martin Casado, Steven Sinofsky, Aaron Levie)

title: DeepSeek 正式发布 V4 API：Flash/Pro 双版本齐发，百万上下文成标配
content: DeepSeek has released its V4 model family, offering both V4‑Pro and V4‑Flash with a 1 million‑token context window. The Flash edition delivers low‑latency, high‑value inference with tiered pricing, while Pro delivers top‑tier performance via a 1.6 T‑parameter MoE architecture. Both versions support non‑thinking and thinking modes, JSON output, tool calls, and agent capabilities. All weights and models are fully open‑source with no feature cuts, enabling affordable, high‑capability deployment.
eventKey: deepseek-正式发布-api-flash-pro-双版本齐发

title: codex 遇到了灵异事件。
content: The user upgraded Codex and switched voice styles while using two GPT Plus accounts. After sending a request, the A account reported out‑of‑credits. Switching to the B account caused a drastic change: the B account's code had completely different content, with 1893 and 3675 lines unrelated to the user’s modifications, resulting in the disappearance of the user’s changes. The user’s git history was corrupted, showing only folder files. The incident was described as a supernatural or unexplained event.
eventKey: codex-遇到了灵异事件
normalizedTitle: codex 遇到了灵异事件

title: 2026 04 24 HackerNews
content: 2026 Hacker News highlights show a trend toward simpler, more flexible cloud and security solutions. exe.dev promises resource‑agnostic VMs with built‑in TLS to replace complex Kubernetes stacks, while new Docker images for Arch Linux achieve reproducible builds. Apple fixes a notification‑cache flaw that let deleted messages be recovered, and Bitwarden CLI is recalled after a supply‑chain infection. Other stories cover a Firefox fingerprinting bug, telecom surveillance via SS7, a French data breach, and the rise of AI‑driven coding tools.
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 04 24 hackernews

title: Meta 内部宣布将裁员 10% 约 8000 个岗位
content: Meta plans to cut 10% of its workforce—about 8,000 employees—and stop hiring the 6,000 open positions slated for May 20. The reduction is meant to improve efficiency and offset high AI spending. Meta has spent heavily this year on AI partnerships, and the executive team says the layoffs will balance those investments. The move follows a leak and comes as other tech firms also trim costs.
eventKey: meta-内部宣布将裁员-8000-个岗位
normalizedTitle: meta 内部宣布将裁员 10 约 8000 个岗位

title: Anthropic调查Mythos模型遭未授权访问事件
content: Anthropic confirmed that unauthorized users accessed its newest high‑risk AI model, “Mythos Preview,” via a third‑party contractor’s environment. The company is investigating the incident and reports no harm to its systems.
eventKey: anthropic调查mythos模型遭未授权访问事件
normalizedTitle: anthropic调查mythos模型遭未授权访问事件

title: 淘宝天猫正式上线售后 AI 假图识别模型
content: Taobao and Tmall have launched an AI-driven fake-image detection system for after‑sales. The tool is now available to merchants with ratings above 4.8, allowing them to flag suspected AI‑edited or distorted product photos via a quick‑reply option in the QianNiu app. Positive detections affect resolution outcomes and trigger alerts. The system covers multiple false‑image types and will broaden its scope as accuracy improves. Last year, the platform’s integrity program saved merchants over 4 billion yuan, and new initiatives for 2026 aim to enhance the business environment.
eventKey: 淘宝天猫正式上线售后-假图识别模型
